hero.h1: Senior Python Developer — backend systems, APIs, and software that ships.
hero.sub: I build backend systems and APIs in Python. I occasionally work on AI tools and frontend — when the project needs it.

trust.heading: Built in environments where software has to stay reliable.
trust.sub: The strongest signal I can offer right now is not a polished slogan but the kind of teams and systems I've worked in: research analytics, fintech, and production backend delivery.

items.label: Production domains
items.note: Experience across data-heavy and high-stakes environments where correctness, uptime, and maintainability matter.

items.label: Ownership style
items.note: Comfortable taking work from ambiguous problem definition through implementation, cleanup, and production rollout.

items.label: Engagement model
items.note: Clear communication, registered sole proprietorship in Poland, and a working style that fits remote product and engineering teams.

companies.name: Energy Aspects
companies.domain: Research analytics and internal tools for institutional energy-market products.

companies.name: JIT Team

companies.name: Equiti

expertise.heading: What I work on
expertise.sub: The areas where I can take ownership from first line to production.

items.title: Python Backend Engineering
items.description: Production-grade Python services built to last: FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, async patterns, clean architecture, tests, CI/CD. Opinionated about maintainability.

items.title: APIs & System Design
items.description: REST API design, async data pipelines, PostgreSQL, Redis, multi-tenant systems. Comfortable reasoning about scalability and making architectural tradeoffs explicit.

items.title: Automation & Integrations
items.description: Python workflows that replace manual, error-prone processes. Celery, scheduled jobs, API integrations, data pipelines. Built to run unattended with clear observability.

items.title: AI / ML
items.description: RAG pipelines, LLM agents, document intelligence, structured extraction. Practical tooling built as part of a larger system — not standalone demos.

items.title: Frontend Delivery
items.description: When the product requires it: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind. Not a designer, but builds interfaces that work well and don't embarrass the backend.

projects.heading: Selected work
projects.sub: Projects I'm comfortable putting my name on.
projects.pageSub: Things I've built, from side projects to production systems.
projects.comingSoonSub: Currently documenting additional work. Check back soon.

about.heading: About
about.availableText: Not open to new full-time engagements at the moment
about.availabilityNote: I'm fully committed to a current client project, so I'm not taking on new work at full capacity right now. I'm still happy to connect and discuss future opportunities, timelines, and whether we're a good fit down the line.
about.companyBody:
I operate as a registered sole proprietorship (CEIDG) in Poland for freelance and B2B contracts — programming and related IT services (PKD 62.10.B and associated codes). Registered address: ul. Obrońców Westerplatte 144A, 80-317 Gdańsk.

NIP: 8442338935 · REGON: 522772081
about.bio1: I'm a Python developer with a background in backend engineering, financial systems, and automation. I've worked in energy market intelligence, fintech, and IT services — mostly building the kind of software that handles real data and real edge cases.
about.bio2: My primary tool is Python. I occasionally work with AI/ML and React when the project calls for it, but backend systems and APIs are where I spend most of my time.
about.bio3: I'm comfortable owning a project end-to-end: from architecture decisions through implementation to deployment. I care about code quality, clear architecture, and making technical decisions that the next engineer can understand.
about.bio4: I work best with companies that have a clear problem, respect engineering, and want someone who communicates well with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

experience.note: Research analytics — pipelines and internal tools turning market and commodity data into products for institutional subscribers.

experience.domain: IT services & software development · Warsaw / remote
experience.note: Client projects in a software-house model — backend APIs, integrations, data processing, and shipping maintainable services for teams in Poland and abroad.
Backend and platform work for a regulated online broker — trading workflows, integrations, and internal tooling in a high-availability environment.

about.how1: I start with the problem, not the stack. A good solution is one that fits the actual constraints — team size, operational maturity, timeline, budget — not the one that uses the most interesting technology.
about.how2: I communicate clearly and early. If something is going to take longer than expected, you hear about it before it becomes a problem. If the requirements have a hidden complexity, I flag it in the planning phase.
about.how3: I write code that other engineers can read. Good naming, clear structure, tests on the important paths. The kind of code that doesn't need a 30-minute explanation before you can contribute to it.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.sub: I'm focused on an ongoing project, so I'm not starting new engagements at full capacity — but I'm glad to hear what you're building and explore options for later. You can use the form below or email me directly.
contact.emailSub: If you'd rather write from your own inbox, use the address below. I read everything; replies may take a few business days when I'm deep in delivery.
lookingItems: Teams that value engineering quality and clear communication
Project-based or longer-term engagements (open to both)
Remote or hybrid, Europe timezone preferred

contactExpectations.heading: What to expect
contactExpectations.sub: A few practical details before you send anything.

items.title: Reply window
items.body: Usually within a few business days. Faster for clear, concrete project inquiries.

items.title: Best fit
items.body: Backend systems, APIs, automation, and adjacent AI tooling where Python is central.

items.title: Working model
items.body: Remote-first, B2B-friendly, Europe timezone preferred. Short projects and longer engagements are both fine.

contactForm.heading: Project inquiry form
contactForm.sub: Share the basics and I'll get back to you by email. Short, concrete messages are best.
contactForm.subjectPlaceholder: What do you need help with?
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: A few sentences about the project, scope, timing, or the problem you need solved.
contactForm.privacyNote: This form sends your message to me via Resend and may send a confirmation email back to you. Don't include secrets or sensitive credentials.
contactForm.botProtectionNote: Protected by a captcha check to reduce automated spam.

messages.success: Message sent. I'll reply by email when I can.
messages.configError: The contact form is not configured correctly yet. Please email me directly instead.
messages.sendError: Something went wrong while sending your message. Please try again or email me directly.
messages.captchaError: Spam protection check failed. Please try again.

legal.privacyIntro: This site is a personal portfolio. I don't use advertising trackers or marketing cookies on these pages, but I do use basic analytics and contact-form infrastructure described below.
legal.privacyControllerBody: The controller of the data processed through this site is Daniel Milewski, sole proprietorship registered in Poland. If you contact me through the site, I use the submitted data only to review your inquiry and reply.
legal.privacyFormBody: When you send a message through the contact form, the submitted details (name, email address, optional company, subject and message) are processed to deliver your inquiry to my inbox. Delivery is handled through Resend. The form may also send a short confirmation email back to you after successful submission. Anti-spam protection may be provided through a captcha provider such as hCaptcha or Cloudflare Turnstile.
legal.privacyAnalyticsBody: This site uses Cloudflare Web Analytics to measure visits, referrers, countries and basic performance metrics. The goal is to understand site usage and monitor reliability, not to build advertising profiles.
legal.privacyCookiesBody: The site uses a functional NEXT_LOCALE cookie to remember your language choice. Cloudflare Web Analytics is configured in a privacy-first way and is not used here for advertising or cross-site tracking.
legal.privacyRetentionBody: Messages sent through the contact form may remain in my email inbox for as long as reasonably necessary to handle the conversation, keep business correspondence, or follow up on future collaboration. Analytics data retention is governed by the relevant provider's settings and policies.
legal.privacyContact: Questions: contact me at the email shown on the Contact page.
legal.privacyUpdates: I may update this page occasionally; the "last updated" date reflects the latest revision.
